steps.title: Write vertex form
steps.content:
The maximum daylight is $13.84$ hours at $t=3$, so the quadratic has vertex $(3,13.84)$. Use vertex form for the daylight function.

$$d(t)=a(t-3)^2+13.84$$

steps.title: Evaluate March first
steps.content: March 1 corresponds to $t=0$, so substitute $0$ into the model. $$d(0)=-0.2(0-3)^2+13.84$$ $$d(0)=-0.2(9)+13.84$$ $$d(0)=12.04$$ The answer is 12.04.
